economic_notes: Government business enterprises include MicMac Industries of Big Cove Inc., McGraw Seafood (2008) Inc., River of Fire Market Inc., Maologetimej Dev. Corp. Inc., 711394 NB Inc., McGraw Peat Moss, McGraw Aquaculture. Fully consolidated subsidiaries include Big Cove Wellness Committee Inc. (Dept 600s) and others.
notes: Complex consolidation: 3 fully consolidated subsidiaries (line-by-line) including Big Cove Wellness Committee Inc.; 7 government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method including MicMac Industries, McGraw Seafood (2008), River of Fire Market, Maologetimej Dev Corp, 711394 NB Inc., McGraw Peat Moss, McGraw Aquaculture. Net debt position of $24,234,837. Equity losses from GBEs total approximately $7.6M. Deferred revenue is very large at $36.1M indicating significant unspent government transfers. Salaries figure taken from wages and benefits line on statement of operations. ISC funding identified separately; total government transfers estimated from ISC + Health Canada + DFO + CMHC + Province of NB lines. OSR includes commercial fisheries and other own-source revenues net of deferred revenue closing adjustment.
